station.name: Newport (Narragansett Bay reference)
station.note: Bristol Harbor high water lags Newport by only a few minutes; Newport is the reliable harmonic reference station.

live_wind.name: Newport
live_wind.note: Real anemometer at the East Passage mouth — closest obs to the seaward course legs.

live_wind.name: Conimicut Light
live_wind.note: Real anemometer ~3 mi N up the East Passage; the up-bay obs.

offshore.name: Block Island (NDBC 44097)
offshore.note: What's arriving from the south / open-ocean context.
